2605.07694.title: Dependence on Early and Late Reverberation of Single-Channel Speaker Distance Estimation
2605.07694.paper_summary: Single-channel speaker distance estimation has recently achieved centimeter-level accuracy in simulated environments, yet it remains unclear which components of the room impulse response (RIR) the model exploits and how performance depends on the recording conditions. In this work, we decompose simulated RIRs into four variants (full, direct-only, no-late, and no-early) using the mixing time estimated from the echo density function as the boundary between early reflections and late reverberation. We define four calibration scenarios, from fully calibrated (synchronised capture, known source level) to fully uncalibrated (arbitrary onset, unknown level), and evaluate all combinations on a matched dataset. Results show that without time calibration, mean absolute error (MAE) increases to $1.29$ m and the model extracts reverberation-based cues, with early reflections emerging as the most informative component. Further analysis against DRR, $C_{50}$, and $T_{60}$ confirms that estimation accuracy improves with stronger early energy and degrades in highly reverberant environments. When time calibration is available, the model achieves a MAE of $0.14$ m by extracting the propagation delay alone, regardless of the RIR content.
2605.07694.paper_summary_zh: 單通道揚聲器距離估計最近在模擬環境中達到了厘米級的準確度，但尚不清楚模型利用了房間脈衝響應（RIR）的哪些組件，以及性能如何依賴於錄音條件。在這項工作中，我們將模擬的RIR分解為四種變體（完整、僅直接、無延遲和無早期），使用從回聲密度函數估算的混合時間作為早期反射和晚期混響之間的邊界。我們定義了四種校準場景，從完全校準（同步捕獲，已知源級別）到完全未校準（任意開始，未知級別），並在匹配數據集上評估所有組合。結果顯示，在沒有時間校準的情況下，平均絕對誤差（MAE）增加到$1.29$米，模型提取了基於混響的線索，早期反射成為最具信息量的組件。進一步針對DRR、$C_{50}$和$T_{60}$的分析確認，估計準確度隨著早期能量的增強而提高，並在高度混響的環境中下降。當時間校準可用時，模型通過僅提取傳播延遲達到$0.14$米的MAE，無論RIR內容如何。
2605.07694.author: Michael Neri et.al.
2605.07694.authors: Michael Neri, Archontis Politis, Tuomas Virtanen
